evals.name: Post text content to LinkedIn via Chrome
evals.prompt: Use Chrome to post on LinkedIn. The content should be: "Excited to announce our Series A funding of $5M! We're building the future of developer tooling. Thanks to our amazing team and investors. #startup #devtools" I'm already logged into LinkedIn.
evals.expected_output: AppleScript commands to open Chrome, navigate to LinkedIn, inject the post content via JavaScript, and submit it

assertions.text: Response includes an osascript/AppleScript command that sets the URL to linkedin.com
Response includes a page load wait mechanism checking document.readyState
Response includes JavaScript that inserts the post text containing 'Series A funding' into a contenteditable element or textarea
Response includes a step to click a submit/post button via JavaScript selector or AppleScript keystroke fallback
Response attempts JavaScript DOM interaction (querySelector, execute javascript) before falling back to System Events

evals.name: Post with image upload to a CMS via Chrome
evals.prompt: Open Chrome and go to https://cms.example.com/new-post. Create a new blog post with title "Q1 2026 Product Update" and body "We shipped 14 features this quarter including real-time collaboration and AI suggestions." Also upload the hero image from /Users/me/Desktop/hero-q1.png. I'm already authenticated.
evals.expected_output: AppleScript commands to navigate to the CMS URL, fill in title and body fields via JS injection, trigger file upload dialog, and use System Events to select the image file

assertions.text: Response includes an osascript command that navigates to https://cms.example.com/new-post
Response includes JavaScript that inserts 'Q1 2026 Product Update' into a title input or field
Response includes JavaScript that inserts the body text about 14 features into a content editor or textarea
Response includes System Events interaction for the file picker dialog referencing /Users/me/Desktop/hero-q1.png
Response escapes quotes properly across bash, AppleScript, and JavaScript layers (no unescaped nested quotes)

evals.name: Post to a platform with stubborn shadow DOM buttons
evals.prompt: I need to post a comment on https://community.example.com/thread/42. The comment is: "Great discussion! Here's our benchmarks: latency dropped 40% after switching to edge functions." The submit button doesn't respond to normal JS clicks — it's inside a shadow DOM component. I'm already logged in on Chrome.
evals.expected_output: AppleScript commands that attempt JS click first, then fall back to AppleScript System Events keystroke or coordinate-based clicking for the shadow DOM submit button

assertions.text: Response includes an osascript command navigating to https://community.example.com/thread/42
Response includes JavaScript that inserts the comment text about benchmarks and edge functions into an editor element
Response first attempts a JavaScript-based click on the submit button before using AppleScript fallback
Response includes a System Events AppleScript fallback using keystroke or coordinate click for when JS click fails on shadow DOM
Response mentions shadowRoot traversal or acknowledges shadow DOM as a reason for JS click failure
Response includes a step to verify the comment was submitted by checking page content or success indicators

evals.name: Post news to linkedin page
evals.prompt: Open the Google Chrome profile that is specified in the parameters and do the post with just the test message body.
evals.expected_output: A message is posted on the LinkedIn page.

assertions.text: Opening an account shows the post with this test message body.
